---
title: "Title of Your Article"
short-title: "Short Title"
format:
  aea-pdf:
    keep-tex: true
    # Journal options: AER (default), PP, JEL, JEP, AEJ
    # classoption: [AER]
    # Draft mode: add draftmode or reviewmode to classoption
    # classoption: [AER, draftmode]
    # draft-spacing: 1.5
    # For PP journal, add to header:
    # include-in-header:
    #   text: |
    #     \usepackage{mathptmx}
author:
  - name: Jane Doe
    affiliations:
      - name: University One
    email: doe@example.com
  - name: John Smith
    affiliations:
      - name: University Two
    email: smith@example.com
acknowledgements: "Acknowledgements go here."
date: today
pub-month: Month
pub-year: Year
pub-volume: Vol
pub-issue: Issue
jel: "D72, D78"
keywords:
  - Keyword 1
  - Keyword 2
abstract: |
  Your abstract goes here. This should briefly describe the main findings
  of your research.
bibliography: bibliography.bib
---

Your introductory material goes here, before the first section heading.
Do not use an "Introduction" heading for AER and AEJ journals.

# First Section in Body

Your content here. Use citations like @angrist2010 or
\citet{angrist2010} for in-text and \citep{angrist2010} for
parenthetical references.

## Subsection

Subsection content. Equations work as usual:

$$
Y_i = \alpha + \beta X_i + \varepsilon_i
$$
